item.title: Shiamak One Year Program – Stepping Up Digital Engagement for Aspiring Dancers
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:4:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:464:"

The Shiamak One Year Program is a professional dance training initiative crafted for passionate dancers aged 15–28. Led by Shiamak Davar’s renowned faculty, the program offers intensive training, performance exposure, and career-building opportunities across diverse dance styles.

Despite its strong reputation, the challenge was clear: reach high-intent dance aspirants and convert interest into enrollments through a focused digital approach.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:11:"Observation";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:531:"
  • The existing reputation wasn’t translating into digital conversions.
  • The target audience was mobile-savvy but had a low attention span.
  • Minimizing friction in lead capture would be key to higher conversions.
  • Each platform needed to be used for its specific strength intent, reach, or ease.
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:2390:"

A multi-platform strategy was executed to generate quality leads and boost program awareness using:

Targeted high-intent queries like “professional dance training” and “Shiamak Davar dance program.”

Ran performance max campaigns to reach a broader but relevant audience across Google’s ecosystem (Search, Display, YouTube, Gmail, etc.).

Directed users to the landing page using creative storytelling and program highlights.

Used native forms to reduce friction, allowing fast in-app lead submissions.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:6:"Result";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:3106:"

1,251

Clicks

531

Leads

7,843

Clicks

5.62%

CTR

57

Leads

1.25%

CTR

26,947

Clicks showing
strong interest

237

Leads

The integrated digital campaign for the Shiamak One Year Program delivered high-quality leads and expanded reach across the right audience. With Instant Forms driving conversions, Google Search capturing intent, and PMAX building awareness, the strategy effectively supported both enrollment and long-term brand positioning in the professional dance education space.

";}}

The Shiamak One Year Program is a professional dance training initiative crafted for passionate dancers aged 15–28. Led by Shiamak Davar’s renowned faculty, the program offers intensive training, performance exposure, and career-building opportunities across diverse dance styles.

Despite its strong reputation, the challenge was clear: reach high-intent dance aspirants and convert interest into enrollments through a focused digital approach.

• The existing reputation wasn’t translating into digital conversions.
  • The target audience was mobile-savvy but had a low attention span.
  • Minimizing friction in lead capture would be key to higher conversions.
  • Each platform needed to be used for its specific strength intent, reach, or ease.

A multi-platform strategy was executed to generate quality leads and boost program awareness using:

Targeted high-intent queries like “professional dance training” and “Shiamak Davar dance program.”

Ran performance max campaigns to reach a broader but relevant audience across Google’s ecosystem (Search, Display, YouTube, Gmail, etc.).

Directed users to the landing page using creative storytelling and program highlights.

Used native forms to reduce friction, allowing fast in-app lead submissions.

1,251

Clicks

531

Leads

7,843

Clicks

5.62%

CTR

57

Leads

1.25%

CTR

26,947

Clicks showing
strong interest

237

Leads

The integrated digital campaign for the Shiamak One Year Program delivered high-quality leads and expanded reach across the right audience. With Instant Forms driving conversions, Google Search capturing intent, and PMAX building awareness, the strategy effectively supported both enrollment and long-term brand positioning in the professional dance education space.
Shiamak Case Study Digital Engagement Growth
Learn how Digiveritaz increased digital engagement for Shiamak’s one-year program.

item.title: EBCO – Forging Digital Success with Integrated Campaigns
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:4:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:370:"

EBCO, a leading Indian brand since 1963, offers a vast range of innovative hardware fittings across furniture, kitchen systems, architectural hardware, office ergonomics, and lighting solutions. Known for its quality and engineering excellence, the brand sought to scale its digital presence and drive measurable growth across awareness, traffic, and conversions.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:11:"Observation";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:544:"
  • Despite strong offline presence, EBCO's online visibility was limited.
  • Product awareness across categories was not optimized on digital platforms.
  • There was untapped potential in reaching intent-driven customers online.
  • A full-funnel approach was necessary, from brand recall to conversion.
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:3004:"

A full-funnel digital strategy was deployed across Google and Facebook with a clear segmentation by campaign objective:

Focused on impressions using Google Display Network and Facebook Reach Ads to build top-of-mind brand awareness.

Optimized for clicks to drive users to product/category pages using persuasive ad creatives and strong CTAs.

Google Search campaigns were structured around high-intent queries, coupled with strategic remarketing to recover drop-offs and abandoned carts.

Re-engaged past website visitors through custom audience segments and dynamic product ads to drive return visits and conversions.

Performance data was constantly reviewed to refine audience targeting, bids, and creatives.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:6:"Result";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:890:"

12M+

Impressions

100K+

Website Clicks

2.34x

ROAS Achieved

The campaigns laid a solid foundation for future digital scale-ups, with measurable performance across all funnel stages.

Through a well-structured digital strategy, EBCO successfully transformed its online footprint. The integration of Google and Facebook campaigns helped boost brand visibility, increase website traffic, and drive profitable conversions. With a validated digital roadmap in place, EBCO is well-positioned for continued growth in the competitive home improvement and hardware space.

";}}

EBCO, a leading Indian brand since 1963, offers a vast range of innovative hardware fittings across furniture, kitchen systems, architectural hardware, office ergonomics, and lighting solutions. Known for its quality and engineering excellence, the brand sought to scale its digital presence and drive measurable growth across awareness, traffic, and conversions.

• Despite strong offline presence, EBCO's online visibility was limited.
  • Product awareness across categories was not optimized on digital platforms.
  • There was untapped potential in reaching intent-driven customers online.
  • A full-funnel approach was necessary, from brand recall to conversion.

A full-funnel digital strategy was deployed across Google and Facebook with a clear segmentation by campaign objective:

Focused on impressions using Google Display Network and Facebook Reach Ads to build top-of-mind brand awareness.

Optimized for clicks to drive users to product/category pages using persuasive ad creatives and strong CTAs.

Google Search campaigns were structured around high-intent queries, coupled with strategic remarketing to recover drop-offs and abandoned carts.

Re-engaged past website visitors through custom audience segments and dynamic product ads to drive return visits and conversions.

Performance data was constantly reviewed to refine audience targeting, bids, and creatives.

12M+

Impressions

100K+

Website Clicks

2.34x

ROAS Achieved

The campaigns laid a solid foundation for future digital scale-ups, with measurable performance across all funnel stages.

Through a well-structured digital strategy, EBCO successfully transformed its online footprint. The integration of Google and Facebook campaigns helped boost brand visibility, increase website traffic, and drive profitable conversions. With a validated digital roadmap in place, EBCO is well-positioned for continued growth in the competitive home improvement and hardware space.
EBCO Case Study Integrated Digital Campaign Success
See how Digiveritaz delivered integrated digital success for EBCO.

a:5:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:639:"

MY BID is a digital-first e-commerce platform that combines the utility of an online store, auction site, marketplace, and social shopping experience. Built to provide users with diverse purchase options, including bidding in auctions, MY BID aims to create a dynamic and engaging shopping environment.

Despite its unique offering, the brand faced a critical challenge: increasing the number of registered users. While traffic to the platform existed, conversions from visits to actual sign-ups were low. The need was clear, design a digital strategy that could attract, engage, and convert users across multiple touchpoints.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:11:"Observation";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:553:"

MY BID’s registration bottleneck revealed several key insights:

  • High traffic didn’t always result in high registrations, indicating a disconnect between visit intent and platform action.
  • Platform value needed to be better communicated at all stages—from awareness to conversion.
  • Each platform offered unique strengths, and success depended on leveraging them correctly across the marketing funnel.
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:2395:"

To address these insights, a full-funnel digital campaign strategy was launched with the objective of increasing user registrations across Meta (Facebook & Instagram) and Google (Search, Display, Programmatic). The campaigns were segmented into tactical objectives:

Driving users directly to the registration page.

Boosting interaction to build familiarity and interest.

Building credibility and encouraging further exploration.

Delivering quick, high-impact messages to prompt immediate action.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:17:"Platform Strategy";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:1239:"

Chosen for its ability to deliver engaging content and encourage real-time interaction, particularly among mobile-first users.

Used for intent-led targeting (Search) and broad awareness-building (Display & Programmatic).

";}i:4;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:6:"Result";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:4529:"

The campaigns delivered strong results, with performance varying by platform and objective:

1,880

Successful Registrations

7.2%

Success Rate

6,680

Mobile Verifications

1,361

Registrations from
mobile-first users

21,563

Clicks

164

Successful Registrations

61,290

Instagram engagements

26,986

Facebook interactions

21,803

Impressions

789

New likes boosting
credibility and reach

MY BID’s multi-platform digital marketing strategy successfully tackled the core challenge of increasing user registrations. The blend of awareness, engagement, and performance marketing ensured strong results across both Meta and Google.

Google Search proved the most efficient at delivering qualified leads, while Instagram drove impressive mobile engagement and conversions. Facebook played a supporting role in traffic and community building, and Display campaigns lifted brand awareness.

This integrated campaign not only delivered over 3,400 successful registrations but also laid a strong foundation for MY BID’s ongoing digital growth. The case stands as a testament to how a tailored, data-driven marketing approach can turn platform challenges into growth opportunities.

";}}

MY BID is a digital-first e-commerce platform that combines the utility of an online store, auction site, marketplace, and social shopping experience. Built to provide users with diverse purchase options, including bidding in auctions, MY BID aims to create a dynamic and engaging shopping environment.

Despite its unique offering, the brand faced a critical challenge: increasing the number of registered users. While traffic to the platform existed, conversions from visits to actual sign-ups were low. The need was clear, design a digital strategy that could attract, engage, and convert users across multiple touchpoints.

MY BID’s registration bottleneck revealed several key insights:

  • High traffic didn’t always result in high registrations, indicating a disconnect between visit intent and platform action.
  • Platform value needed to be better communicated at all stages—from awareness to conversion.
  • Each platform offered unique strengths, and success depended on leveraging them correctly across the marketing funnel.

To address these insights, a full-funnel digital campaign strategy was launched with the objective of increasing user registrations across Meta (Facebook & Instagram) and Google (Search, Display, Programmatic). The campaigns were segmented into tactical objectives:

Driving users directly to the registration page.

Boosting interaction to build familiarity and interest.

Building credibility and encouraging further exploration.

Delivering quick, high-impact messages to prompt immediate action.

Chosen for its ability to deliver engaging content and encourage real-time interaction, particularly among mobile-first users.

Used for intent-led targeting (Search) and broad awareness-building (Display & Programmatic).

The campaigns delivered strong results, with performance varying by platform and objective:

1,880

Successful Registrations

7.2%

Success Rate

6,680

Mobile Verifications

1,361

Registrations from
mobile-first users

21,563

Clicks

164

Successful Registrations

61,290

Instagram engagements

26,986

Facebook interactions

21,803

Impressions

789

New likes boosting
credibility and reach

MY BID’s multi-platform digital marketing strategy successfully tackled the core challenge of increasing user registrations. The blend of awareness, engagement, and performance marketing ensured strong results across both Meta and Google.

Google Search proved the most efficient at delivering qualified leads, while Instagram drove impressive mobile engagement and conversions. Facebook played a supporting role in traffic and community building, and Display campaigns lifted brand awareness.

This integrated campaign not only delivered over 3,400 successful registrations but also laid a strong foundation for MY BID’s ongoing digital growth. The case stands as a testament to how a tailored, data-driven marketing approach can turn platform challenges into growth opportunities.
MyBid App Case Study Multi-Platform Growth
Discover how Digiveritaz scaled MyBid App’s growth across platforms with performance-driven campaigns.

a:4:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:489:"

JK Shah Classes is a renowned name in India’s education landscape, with over four decades of experience coaching aspirants for professional courses such as CA, CS, CMA, and CFA. With centers across major cities like Mumbai, Ahmedabad, and Delhi, the brand has built a legacy of academic excellence and trust. However, in today’s digitally driven education space, JK Shah Classes sought to strengthen its digital presence by generating high-quality leads through online channels.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:11:"Observation";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:558:"

While JK Shah Classes had a strong offline reputation, their digital outreach presented three key challenges:

  • Ensuring their advertising efforts reached the right audience actively searching for relevant courses.
  • Generating not just a high volume of leads, but ensuring lead quality and potential for conversion.
  • Improving the return on ad spend through better conversion from impressions to actual inquiries.
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:2825:"

To meet these challenges, a strategic digital advertising campaign was launched across Meta (Facebook and Instagram) and Google. Key focus areas included:

On Meta, we used detailed segmentation based on demographics, interests, and behaviors, along with lookalike audiences to replicate high-intent users. On Google, keyword-focused ad groups were created to reach users actively searching for specific courses.

On Meta, image and video ads showcased faculty credentials, student success stories, and course benefits, paired with clear CTAs. On Google, we crafted sharp, persuasive text ads highlighting USPs and linking to dedicated course pages.

Custom landing pages were designed for each campaign, ensuring fast load times, mobile responsiveness, and clear lead capture forms to boost conversions.

Continuous A/B testing was conducted on creatives, ad copies, and targeting parameters. Budgets were dynamically adjusted based on performance data to maximize lead quality and ROI.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:6:"Result";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:908:"

The digital strategy led to significant improvements in both lead quantity and quality:

4M+

Impressions

1.7M+

unique user reach

1500+

Leads generated
during campaign

80%

Marked as high
quality leads

This case study demonstrates how a well-executed digital advertising campaign can transform brand visibility into tangible business growth. For JK Shah Classes, the result was not just a spike in inquiries—but a pipeline filled with students truly interested in their programs.

";}}

JK Shah Classes is a renowned name in India’s education landscape, with over four decades of experience coaching aspirants for professional courses such as CA, CS, CMA, and CFA. With centers across major cities like Mumbai, Ahmedabad, and Delhi, the brand has built a legacy of academic excellence and trust. However, in today’s digitally driven education space, JK Shah Classes sought to strengthen its digital presence by generating high-quality leads through online channels.

While JK Shah Classes had a strong offline reputation, their digital outreach presented three key challenges:

  • Ensuring their advertising efforts reached the right audience actively searching for relevant courses.
  • Generating not just a high volume of leads, but ensuring lead quality and potential for conversion.
  • Improving the return on ad spend through better conversion from impressions to actual inquiries.

To meet these challenges, a strategic digital advertising campaign was launched across Meta (Facebook and Instagram) and Google. Key focus areas included:

On Meta, we used detailed segmentation based on demographics, interests, and behaviors, along with lookalike audiences to replicate high-intent users. On Google, keyword-focused ad groups were created to reach users actively searching for specific courses.

On Meta, image and video ads showcased faculty credentials, student success stories, and course benefits, paired with clear CTAs. On Google, we crafted sharp, persuasive text ads highlighting USPs and linking to dedicated course pages.

Custom landing pages were designed for each campaign, ensuring fast load times, mobile responsiveness, and clear lead capture forms to boost conversions.

Continuous A/B testing was conducted on creatives, ad copies, and targeting parameters. Budgets were dynamically adjusted based on performance data to maximize lead quality and ROI.

The digital strategy led to significant improvements in both lead quantity and quality:

4M+

Impressions

1.7M+

unique user reach

1500+

Leads generated
during campaign

80%

Marked as high
quality leads

This case study demonstrates how a well-executed digital advertising campaign can transform brand visibility into tangible business growth. For JK Shah Classes, the result was not just a spike in inquiries—but a pipeline filled with students truly interested in their programs.
JK Shah Classes Case Study Quality Lead Generation
See how Digiveritaz generated high-quality leads for JK Shah Classes using performance marketing.

item.title: Transcon Triumph – Building Leads & Visibility Through Multi-Platform Campaigns
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:4:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:237:"

Transcon Triumph, a premium residential development, aimed to strengthen its digital footprint by generating high-quality leads, increasing brand awareness, and engaging potential buyers through a targeted multi-platform approach.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:11:"Observation";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:417:"
  • The brand needed to drive qualified buyer interest in a competitive real estate market.
  • Building trust and visibility among high-intent users was crucial.
  • A mix of platforms was essential to balance awareness with lead acquisition.
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:1919:"

A robust, multi-channel strategy was implemented to align with different stages of the funnel:

Designed to capture interest across search and social, targeting users actively researching or interested in real estate projects.

High-impact videos were created to tell the project’s story, amplify brand presence, and visually communicate the project’s premium lifestyle offering.

Focused on community interaction and content sharing to boost social reach and build an engaged follower base.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:6:"Result";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:2581:"

146

Meta leads

143

Google Leads

300K+

Views reflecting strong content relevance

64.08%

VTR indicating high
viewer retention

51K+

Interactions showing
higher reach

The Transcon Triumph campaign effectively integrated lead generation, awareness, and engagement strategies across Google, Meta, and YouTube. Meta proved highly cost-efficient for leads and engagement, while YouTube delivered exceptional view-through performance, reinforcing brand presence. This full-funnel approach not only increased visibility but also brought in qualified prospects, setting a strong precedent for future real estate digital campaigns.

";}}

Transcon Triumph, a premium residential development, aimed to strengthen its digital footprint by generating high-quality leads, increasing brand awareness, and engaging potential buyers through a targeted multi-platform approach.

• The brand needed to drive qualified buyer interest in a competitive real estate market.
  • Building trust and visibility among high-intent users was crucial.
  • A mix of platforms was essential to balance awareness with lead acquisition.

A robust, multi-channel strategy was implemented to align with different stages of the funnel:

Designed to capture interest across search and social, targeting users actively researching or interested in real estate projects.

High-impact videos were created to tell the project’s story, amplify brand presence, and visually communicate the project’s premium lifestyle offering.

Focused on community interaction and content sharing to boost social reach and build an engaged follower base.

146

Meta leads

143

Google Leads

300K+

Views reflecting strong content relevance

64.08%

VTR indicating high
viewer retention

51K+

Interactions showing
higher reach

The Transcon Triumph campaign effectively integrated lead generation, awareness, and engagement strategies across Google, Meta, and YouTube. Meta proved highly cost-efficient for leads and engagement, while YouTube delivered exceptional view-through performance, reinforcing brand presence. This full-funnel approach not only increased visibility but also brought in qualified prospects, setting a strong precedent for future real estate digital campaigns.
Transcon Triumph Case Study Multi-Platform Growth
Discover how Digiveritaz boosted leads and visibility for Transcon through multi-platform campaigns.

item.title: Khyber Cement – Cementing Regional Awareness Through Digital Visibility
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:5:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:315:"

Khyber Cement, a trusted brand in the construction sector, aimed to strengthen brand visibility in Jammu & Kashmir and North India. With a focus on reaching a highly relevant audience, the campaign was designed to maximize exposure through large-scale digital placements and impactful video storytelling.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:9:"Objective";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:378:"
  • Primary Goal: Increase brand visibility in core regional markets
  • Drive awareness through strategic, high-impression campaigns
  • Leverage emotionally resonant content to connect with the audience
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:1385:"

A platform-specific content strategy was implemented, powered by two high-performance TVC campaigns:

  • Meta (Facebook & Instagram): For broad regional reach, engagement, and storytelling
  • YouTube: For scalable video views and deeper content consumption

  • "Dil Se Banao" TVC - Aimed to build emotional connection
  • "Sab Set Rahega" TVC - Highlighted product reliability with relatable messaging
";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:7:"Results";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:1992:"

13.9M+

Impressions

9M+

Total Video Views

2.7M+

Total Views

Up to 1 min 37 sec

Average Watch Time

8M+

Total Unique Reach

16.8M+

Total Impressions

6.2M+

Total Video Views

74K+

Engagements Across Platforms

";}i:4;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Campaign";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:2553:"

Facebook

  • Reach: 3.5M+ unique accounts
  • Impressions: 6.3M+
  • Video Views: 1.8M+ (5.9M video plays)
  • Engagements: 15K+

Instagram

  • Reach: 905K+
  • Impressions: 1.1M+
  • Video Views: 1M+
  • Engagements: 34K+

YouTube

  • Impressions: 2.2M+
  • Video Views: 1.2M+
  • Avg. Watch Time: 1 min 37 sec

Facebook

  • Reach: 2.6M+ unique accounts
  • Impressions: 8.1M+
  • Video Views: 2M+ (7.4M video plays)
  • Engagements: 19K+

Instagram

  • Reach: 987K+
  • Impressions: 1.3M+
  • Video Views: 1.2M+
  • Engagements: 5.8K+

YouTube

  • Impressions: 2.7M+
  • Video Views: 1.5M+
  • Avg. Watch Time: 29 sec

The Khyber Cement campaign successfully established strong regional recall through emotionally resonant storytelling and a powerful digital presence. Facebook and Instagram delivered broad visibility and user engagement, while YouTube drove deep brand immersion with high-quality views and retention. The results validated Khyber’s creative direction and digital investment, building a solid foundation for sustained regional impact and future brand expansion.

";}}

Khyber Cement, a trusted brand in the construction sector, aimed to strengthen brand visibility in Jammu & Kashmir and North India. With a focus on reaching a highly relevant audience, the campaign was designed to maximize exposure through large-scale digital placements and impactful video storytelling.

• Primary Goal: Increase brand visibility in core regional markets
  • Drive awareness through strategic, high-impression campaigns
  • Leverage emotionally resonant content to connect with the audience

A platform-specific content strategy was implemented, powered by two high-performance TVC campaigns:

  • Meta (Facebook & Instagram): For broad regional reach, engagement, and storytelling
  • YouTube: For scalable video views and deeper content consumption

  • "Dil Se Banao" TVC - Aimed to build emotional connection
  • "Sab Set Rahega" TVC - Highlighted product reliability with relatable messaging

13.9M+

Impressions

9M+

Total Video Views

2.7M+

Total Views

Up to 1 min 37 sec

Average Watch Time

8M+

Total Unique Reach

16.8M+

Total Impressions

6.2M+

Total Video Views

74K+

Engagements Across Platforms

Facebook

  • Reach: 3.5M+ unique accounts
  • Impressions: 6.3M+
  • Video Views: 1.8M+ (5.9M video plays)
  • Engagements: 15K+

Instagram

  • Reach: 905K+
  • Impressions: 1.1M+
  • Video Views: 1M+
  • Engagements: 34K+

YouTube

  • Impressions: 2.2M+
  • Video Views: 1.2M+
  • Avg. Watch Time: 1 min 37 sec

Facebook

  • Reach: 2.6M+ unique accounts
  • Impressions: 8.1M+
  • Video Views: 2M+ (7.4M video plays)
  • Engagements: 19K+

Instagram

  • Reach: 987K+
  • Impressions: 1.3M+
  • Video Views: 1.2M+
  • Engagements: 5.8K+

YouTube

  • Impressions: 2.7M+
  • Video Views: 1.5M+
  • Avg. Watch Time: 29 sec

The Khyber Cement campaign successfully established strong regional recall through emotionally resonant storytelling and a powerful digital presence. Facebook and Instagram delivered broad visibility and user engagement, while YouTube drove deep brand immersion with high-quality views and retention. The results validated Khyber’s creative direction and digital investment, building a solid foundation for sustained regional impact and future brand expansion.
Khyber Cement Case Study Digital Visibility Success
See how Digiveritaz helped Khyber Cement build strong regional awareness through targeted digital strategies.

item.title: Legal Junction – Building a Long-Term Lead Engine for Rent Agreement Services
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:4:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:270:"

Legal Junction aimed to capture high-intent users in Pune seeking rent agreement services, while also creating a system that supports recurring revenue through annual renewals. The focus was to build a performance-led, automation-powered funnel via Google Search.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:9:"Objective";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:381:"
  • Generate high-quality leads for Rent Agreement Services in Pune
  • Build a scalable, repeatable funnel for annual agreement renewals
  • Use automation tools to streamline lead engagement and follow-ups
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:1297:"

Google Search Ads – Chosen to target users with strong purchase intent

  • Optimized high-intent keyword targeting
  • Developed compelling ad copy aligned with urgent user needs
  • Built and refined conversion-optimized landing pages
  • Integrated WhatsApp automation for instant lead engagement
  • Captured and nurtured leads for long-term business value
";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:7:"Results";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:1739:"

450+

Quality Leads

7%

Conversion Rate-strong
for legal services

450

CPL, cost-effective
for high LTV

By leveraging Google Search Ads and smart automation, Legal Junction successfully built a high-performance lead funnel that delivers value not just once, but year after year. With high-quality leads, efficient CPL, and a growing customer base returning for renewals, this campaign proves that legal services can thrive with the right digital approach.

";}}

Legal Junction aimed to capture high-intent users in Pune seeking rent agreement services, while also creating a system that supports recurring revenue through annual renewals. The focus was to build a performance-led, automation-powered funnel via Google Search.

• Generate high-quality leads for Rent Agreement Services in Pune
  • Build a scalable, repeatable funnel for annual agreement renewals
  • Use automation tools to streamline lead engagement and follow-ups

Google Search Ads – Chosen to target users with strong purchase intent

  • Optimized high-intent keyword targeting
  • Developed compelling ad copy aligned with urgent user needs
  • Built and refined conversion-optimized landing pages
  • Integrated WhatsApp automation for instant lead engagement
  • Captured and nurtured leads for long-term business value

450+

Quality Leads

7%

Conversion Rate-strong
for legal services

450

CPL, cost-effective
for high LTV

By leveraging Google Search Ads and smart automation, Legal Junction successfully built a high-performance lead funnel that delivers value not just once, but year after year. With high-quality leads, efficient CPL, and a growing customer base returning for renewals, this campaign proves that legal services can thrive with the right digital approach.
Legal Junction Case Study Lead Engine Success
Legal Junction’s long-term lead engine powers rent agreement services using digital marketing strategies that sustain lead service awareness.

a:4:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:316:"

In the context of the COVID-19 pandemic, Hyundai extended its “Pledge To Be Safe” initiative to emphasize the critical importance of maintaining safe physical distance. The campaign aimed to raise awareness around COVID-safe behaviors, while reinforcing Hyundai’s commitment to public health and safety.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:9:"Objective";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:351:"
  • Drive maximum video views to increase awareness around Hyundai’s safety pledge initiative.
  • Achieve broad and consistent visibility across Meta platforms to reinforce Hyundai’s brand as a safety-conscious automaker.
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:2385:"

Created impactful videos demonstrating safe distancing practices integrated within Hyundai’s existing safety pledge framework, ensuring relevance and emotional resonance.

Deployed campaigns on Meta to reach a diverse and large audience beyond just automotive consumers, amplifying the public service message.

Focused campaign optimization on maximizing video views, capitalizing on video’s engagement power to convey detailed health guidance.

Maintained steady, high-frequency impressions to reinforce awareness and ensure the message remained top-of-mind.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:7:"Results";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:1032:"

34.6M+

Users Reached

69M+

Impressions

15.2M+

Video Views

22.03%

View Rate

44%

Watched showing
high engagement

2

Avg. frequency
effective, not repetitive

The campaign successfully amplified Hyundai’s safety message, balancing wide reach and meaningful engagement. By efficiently using Meta’s platforms, Hyundai established strong awareness and promoted its safety pledge effectively, strengthening brand perception among a large audience.

";}}

In the context of the COVID-19 pandemic, Hyundai extended its “Pledge To Be Safe” initiative to emphasize the critical importance of maintaining safe physical distance. The campaign aimed to raise awareness around COVID-safe behaviors, while reinforcing Hyundai’s commitment to public health and safety.

• Drive maximum video views to increase awareness around Hyundai’s safety pledge initiative.
  • Achieve broad and consistent visibility across Meta platforms to reinforce Hyundai’s brand as a safety-conscious automaker.

Created impactful videos demonstrating safe distancing practices integrated within Hyundai’s existing safety pledge framework, ensuring relevance and emotional resonance.

Deployed campaigns on Meta to reach a diverse and large audience beyond just automotive consumers, amplifying the public service message.

Focused campaign optimization on maximizing video views, capitalizing on video’s engagement power to convey detailed health guidance.

Maintained steady, high-frequency impressions to reinforce awareness and ensure the message remained top-of-mind.

34.6M+

Users Reached

69M+

Impressions

15.2M+

Video Views

22.03%

View Rate

44%

Watched showing
high engagement

2

Avg. frequency
effective, not repetitive

The campaign successfully amplified Hyundai’s safety message, balancing wide reach and meaningful engagement. By efficiently using Meta’s platforms, Hyundai established strong awareness and promoted its safety pledge effectively, strengthening brand perception among a large audience.
Discover how Digiveritaz supported Hyundai’s safety campaign through digital amplification.
Hyundai Pledge to Be Safe Campaign Case Study

item.title: Hyundai Elite i20 Lead Generation Campaign
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:4:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:274:"

Hyundai aimed to drive high-quality leads for its popular Elite i20 model using focused digital advertising. The campaign was designed to tap into the growing online audience interested in premium hatchbacks and convert their interest into actionable sales inquiries.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:9:"Objective";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:473:"
  • Generate quality leads for the Hyundai Elite i20 through targeted digital advertising.
  • Increase visibility and engagement among potential car buyers who are actively considering a new vehicle purchase.
  • Build a strong pipeline of interested prospects to support Hyundai’s sales funnel.
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:8:"Solution";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:779:"
  • Utilized Meta’s advertising platforms, including Facebook and Instagram, to maximize reach among the relevant demographic.
  • Created targeted ad creatives highlighting the Elite i20’s key features and benefits to attract potential buyers.
  • Employed precise audience segmentation based on interests, behaviors, and location to ensure ads reached users most likely to convert.
  • Optimized lead forms and call-to-action buttons to streamline the user journey from ad view to lead submission, reducing friction and maximizing conversion rates.
";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:7:"Results";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:908:"

3.3M+

Impressions

2M+

users reached showing
strong visibility

5,000+

leads indicating high
interest in Elite i20

The Hyundai Elite i20 lead generation campaign effectively combined strategic targeting and engaging creatives to capture potential buyers’ interest. Leveraging Meta’s platforms, Hyundai was able to build a substantial pool of qualified leads, laying the foundation for increased showroom visits and sales conversions. This campaign underscores the power of well-executed digital marketing in driving automotive lead generation in a competitive market.

";}}

Hyundai aimed to drive high-quality leads for its popular Elite i20 model using focused digital advertising. The campaign was designed to tap into the growing online audience interested in premium hatchbacks and convert their interest into actionable sales inquiries.

• Generate quality leads for the Hyundai Elite i20 through targeted digital advertising.
  • Increase visibility and engagement among potential car buyers who are actively considering a new vehicle purchase.
  • Build a strong pipeline of interested prospects to support Hyundai’s sales funnel.

• Utilized Meta’s advertising platforms, including Facebook and Instagram, to maximize reach among the relevant demographic.
  • Created targeted ad creatives highlighting the Elite i20’s key features and benefits to attract potential buyers.
  • Employed precise audience segmentation based on interests, behaviors, and location to ensure ads reached users most likely to convert.
  • Optimized lead forms and call-to-action buttons to streamline the user journey from ad view to lead submission, reducing friction and maximizing conversion rates.

3.3M+

Impressions

2M+

users reached showing
strong visibility

5,000+

leads indicating high
interest in Elite i20

The Hyundai Elite i20 lead generation campaign effectively combined strategic targeting and engaging creatives to capture potential buyers’ interest. Leveraging Meta’s platforms, Hyundai was able to build a substantial pool of qualified leads, laying the foundation for increased showroom visits and sales conversions. This campaign underscores the power of well-executed digital marketing in driving automotive lead generation in a competitive market.
Explore how Digiveritaz drove qualified leads for Hyundai Elite i20.
Hyundai Elite i20 Case Study Lead Generation
EBCO - Case Study | DigiVeritaz Digital Marketing Agency In India
The file was compressed from 81.82 KB to 81.82 KB, saving 0 percent, using WP-Optimize
Shiamak - Case Study | DigiVeritaz Digital Marketing Agency In India

The file was compressed from 195.92 KB to 195.92 KB, saving 0 percent, using WP-Optimize

MyBid platform logo representing online bidding or marketplace client

a:8:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:15:"Client Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:624:"

Client Name: The Mauve
Website: https://themauve.co/
Industry: Fashion, Lifestyle & Luxury Accessories
Target Location: India (with pan-India & metro-focused audience)

The Mauve is a modern lifestyle and fashion brand offering curated apparel and accessories with a premium, minimalist aesthetic. While the brand had strong visual appeal and product quality, its organic search presence was limited, resulting in heavy dependence on paid traffic and social media.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:18:"Business Challenge";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:861:"

The fashion eCommerce niche is highly competitive, especially in India where D2C brands aggressively invest in performance marketing. The Mauve faced the following SEO challenges:

  • Low organic visibility for non-branded fashion keywords
  • Product pages not ranking due to thin or non-optimized content
  • Limited category-level keyword coverage
  • Weak internal linking between collections and products
  • Technical SEO gaps affecting crawlability and page performance
  • Over-reliance on paid ads for traffic and conversions
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:14:"SEO Objectives";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:617:"

The SEO campaign was designed to:

  • Build sustainable organic traffic for fashion and lifestyle keywords
  • Improve rankings for category and product-level search queries
  • Strengthen brand visibility beyond social media
  • Optimize eCommerce pages for search intent and conversions
  • Reduce dependency on paid acquisition channels
";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:24:"SEO Strategy Implemented";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:5770:"

  • Performed a comprehensive technical SEO audit
  • Fixed indexation issues and optimized crawl budget
  • Improved mobile responsiveness and UX
  • Optimized Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP)
  • Implemented structured data (Product, Breadcrumb, Organization)

  • Identified high-converting keywords across:
    • Fashion collections
    • Apparel categories
    • Lifestyle accessories
    • Brand + product combinations
  • Mapped keywords based on transactional and commercial intent
  • Focused on long-tail and style-driven queries

  • Optimized category descriptions for SEO without compromising brand tone
  • Enhanced product titles, descriptions, and meta tags
  • Improved heading structure (H1–H3)
  • Added SEO-friendly FAQs to product and collection pages
  • Optimized image alt text for visual search

  • Created SEO-optimized collection descriptions
  • Developed blog and editorial content around fashion trends & styling guides
  • Targeted informational queries to support top-of-funnel traffic
  • Strengthened E-E-A-T through brand storytelling and consistent messaging

  • Built strong internal links between categories, collections, and products
  • Reduced orphan product pages
  • Improved navigation flow for users and search engines
  • Enhanced topical relevance through content clusters

  • Optimized product pages for better CTR and engagement
  • Improved metadata to attract high-intent clicks
  • Ensured SEO changes aligned with UX and CRO best practices
";}i:4;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:16:"Results Achieved";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:677:"

After implementing the SEO strategy, The Mauve observed:

  • Consistent growth in organic traffic
  • Improved rankings for fashion and lifestyle keywords
  • Increased visibility for category-level searches
  • Higher engagement on product and collection pages
  • Reduced dependency on paid traffic channels

(Exact traffic and revenue metrics can be added based on reporting needs.)

";}i:5;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:12:"Key SEO Wins";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:435:"
  • Strong foundation for long-term organic growth
  • Improved discoverability of collections and products
  • Better alignment between SEO, UX, and brand aesthetics
  • Enhanced search-driven conversion potential
";}i:6;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:10:"Tools Used";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:392:"
  • Google Search Console
  • Google Analytics 4
  • Ahrefs / SEMrush
  • Screaming Frog SEO Spider
  • PageSpeed Insights
";}i:7;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:10:"Conclusion";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:301:"

By implementing a structured SEO strategy focused on technical optimization, intent-driven content, and eCommerce best practices, The Mauve successfully built a scalable organic growth channel. The brand is now positioned for sustainable visibility and long-term revenue growth through search.

";}}

Client Name: The Mauve
Website: https://themauve.co/
Industry: Fashion, Lifestyle & Luxury Accessories
Target Location: India (with pan-India & metro-focused audience)

The Mauve is a modern lifestyle and fashion brand offering curated apparel and accessories with a premium, minimalist aesthetic. While the brand had strong visual appeal and product quality, its organic search presence was limited, resulting in heavy dependence on paid traffic and social media.

The fashion eCommerce niche is highly competitive, especially in India where D2C brands aggressively invest in performance marketing. The Mauve faced the following SEO challenges:

  • Low organic visibility for non-branded fashion keywords
  • Product pages not ranking due to thin or non-optimized content
  • Limited category-level keyword coverage
  • Weak internal linking between collections and products
  • Technical SEO gaps affecting crawlability and page performance
  • Over-reliance on paid ads for traffic and conversions

The SEO campaign was designed to:

  • Build sustainable organic traffic for fashion and lifestyle keywords
  • Improve rankings for category and product-level search queries
  • Strengthen brand visibility beyond social media
  • Optimize eCommerce pages for search intent and conversions
  • Reduce dependency on paid acquisition channels

• Performed a comprehensive technical SEO audit
  • Fixed indexation issues and optimized crawl budget
  • Improved mobile responsiveness and UX
  • Optimized Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP)
  • Implemented structured data (Product, Breadcrumb, Organization)

  • Identified high-converting keywords across:
    • Fashion collections
    • Apparel categories
    • Lifestyle accessories
    • Brand + product combinations
  • Mapped keywords based on transactional and commercial intent
  • Focused on long-tail and style-driven queries

  • Optimized category descriptions for SEO without compromising brand tone
  • Enhanced product titles, descriptions, and meta tags
  • Improved heading structure (H1–H3)
  • Added SEO-friendly FAQs to product and collection pages
  • Optimized image alt text for visual search

  • Created SEO-optimized collection descriptions
  • Developed blog and editorial content around fashion trends & styling guides
  • Targeted informational queries to support top-of-funnel traffic
  • Strengthened E-E-A-T through brand storytelling and consistent messaging

  • Built strong internal links between categories, collections, and products
  • Reduced orphan product pages
  • Improved navigation flow for users and search engines
  • Enhanced topical relevance through content clusters

  • Optimized product pages for better CTR and engagement
  • Improved metadata to attract high-intent clicks
  • Ensured SEO changes aligned with UX and CRO best practices

After implementing the SEO strategy, The Mauve observed:

  • Consistent growth in organic traffic
  • Improved rankings for fashion and lifestyle keywords
  • Increased visibility for category-level searches
  • Higher engagement on product and collection pages
  • Reduced dependency on paid traffic channels

(Exact traffic and revenue metrics can be added based on reporting needs.)

• Strong foundation for long-term organic growth
  • Improved discoverability of collections and products
  • Better alignment between SEO, UX, and brand aesthetics
  • Enhanced search-driven conversion potential

• Google Search Console
  • Google Analytics 4
  • Ahrefs / SEMrush
  • Screaming Frog SEO Spider
  • PageSpeed Insights

By implementing a structured SEO strategy focused on technical optimization, intent-driven content, and eCommerce best practices, The Mauve successfully built a scalable organic growth channel. The brand is now positioned for sustainable visibility and long-term revenue growth through search.
SEO case study of The Mauve Co showing how organic traffic, keyword rankings, and visibility improved with a focused SEO strategy.

a:8:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:15:"Client Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:578:"

Client Name: Mayapuri
Website: https://mayapuri.com/ Industry: Bollywood News, Entertainment Media, Celebrity Updates
Target Location: India

Mayapuri is one of India’s most recognized Bollywood and entertainment media brands, known for delivering film news, celebrity interviews, gossip, and industry insights. Despite strong brand recall, the website faced challenges in organic visibility due to high competition in the entertainment news space.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:18:"Business Challenge";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:788:"

The Indian entertainment news niche is extremely competitive, dominated by large media houses and fast-publishing portals. Mayapuri faced the following SEO challenges:

  • Inconsistent organic traffic growth despite high-quality content
  • Poor visibility for trending Bollywood and celebrity-related keywords
  • Weak technical SEO foundation affecting crawlability and indexation
  • Limited keyword coverage beyond branded searches
  • Low SERP visibility for long-tail and Google Discover-friendly content
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:14:"SEO Objectives";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:639:"

The primary goals of the SEO campaign were:

  • Increase organic traffic from Google Search & Discover
  • Improve rankings for Bollywood news, celebrity updates, and film-related keywords
  • Strengthen topical authority in entertainment journalism
  • Fix technical SEO issues impacting performance
  • Enhance CTR through optimized headlines and metadata
";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:24:"SEO Strategy Implemented";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:5749:"

  • Conducted a full technical SEO audit
  • Fixed crawl errors, index bloat, and redirect issues
  • Improved Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP)
  • Optimized mobile usability for news consumption
  • Implemented structured data (NewsArticle, Breadcrumbs, Organization)

  • Identified high-intent keywords across:
    • Fashion collections
    • Apparel categories
    • Lifestyle accessories
    • Brand + product combinations
  • Mapped keywords to existing and new content
  • Focused on long-tail, trend-driven, and AEO-friendly queries

  • Optimized headlines for CTR while maintaining editorial tone
  • Improved H1–H3 hierarchy for news articles
  • Added internal links between related celebrity and movie content
  • Optimized image alt text for Google Discover visibility
  • Enhanced E-E-A-T signals through author profiles and editorial schema

  • Improved visual storytelling with high-quality featured images
  • Optimized publish time based on audience activity
  • Used emotionally engaging yet compliant headlines
  • Focused on freshness, topical relevance, and authority

  • Built strong interlinking between celebrity clusters
  • Improved category and tag structure
  • Reduced orphan pages
  • Enhanced crawl depth for trending content

  • Monitored keyword movements weekly
  • Tracked Discover impressions & clicks via GSC
  • Refined content strategy based on trending queries
  • Continuous metadata testing for CTR improvement
";}i:4;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:16:"Results Achieved";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:677:"

Within months of implementing the SEO strategy, Mayapuri achieved:

  • Significant growth in organic traffic
  • Improved rankings for non-branded Bollywood keywords
  • Increased visibility in Google Discover
  • Better crawl efficiency and index coverage
  • Higher engagement metrics (time on page & pages/session)

(Exact numbers can be added if required for client reporting.)

";}i:5;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:12:"Key SEO Wins";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:433:"
  • Established topical authority in Bollywood news segments
  • Improved Discover performance for celebrity-driven content
  • Reduced dependency on branded searches
  • Strengthened long-term organic visibility
";}i:6;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:10:"Tools Used";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:392:"
  • Google Search Console
  • Google Analytics 4
  • Screaming Frog SEO Spider
  • Ahrefs / SEMrush
  • PageSpeed Insights
";}i:7;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:10:"Conclusion";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:336:"

Through a data-driven SEO strategy focused on technical excellence, content optimization, and Discover visibility, Mayapuri successfully strengthened its organic presence in India’s competitive entertainment news ecosystem. The campaign laid a strong foundation for sustained organic growth and long-term search dominance.

";}}

Client Name: Mayapuri
Website: https://mayapuri.com/ Industry: Bollywood News, Entertainment Media, Celebrity Updates
Target Location: India

Mayapuri is one of India’s most recognized Bollywood and entertainment media brands, known for delivering film news, celebrity interviews, gossip, and industry insights. Despite strong brand recall, the website faced challenges in organic visibility due to high competition in the entertainment news space.

The Indian entertainment news niche is extremely competitive, dominated by large media houses and fast-publishing portals. Mayapuri faced the following SEO challenges:

  • Inconsistent organic traffic growth despite high-quality content
  • Poor visibility for trending Bollywood and celebrity-related keywords
  • Weak technical SEO foundation affecting crawlability and indexation
  • Limited keyword coverage beyond branded searches
  • Low SERP visibility for long-tail and Google Discover-friendly content

The primary goals of the SEO campaign were:

  • Increase organic traffic from Google Search & Discover
  • Improve rankings for Bollywood news, celebrity updates, and film-related keywords
  • Strengthen topical authority in entertainment journalism
  • Fix technical SEO issues impacting performance
  • Enhance CTR through optimized headlines and metadata

• Conducted a full technical SEO audit
  • Fixed crawl errors, index bloat, and redirect issues
  • Improved Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP)
  • Optimized mobile usability for news consumption
  • Implemented structured data (NewsArticle, Breadcrumbs, Organization)

  • Identified high-intent keywords across:
    • Fashion collections
    • Apparel categories
    • Lifestyle accessories
    • Brand + product combinations
  • Mapped keywords to existing and new content
  • Focused on long-tail, trend-driven, and AEO-friendly queries

  • Optimized headlines for CTR while maintaining editorial tone
  • Improved H1–H3 hierarchy for news articles
  • Added internal links between related celebrity and movie content
  • Optimized image alt text for Google Discover visibility
  • Enhanced E-E-A-T signals through author profiles and editorial schema

  • Improved visual storytelling with high-quality featured images
  • Optimized publish time based on audience activity
  • Used emotionally engaging yet compliant headlines
  • Focused on freshness, topical relevance, and authority

  • Built strong interlinking between celebrity clusters
  • Improved category and tag structure
  • Reduced orphan pages
  • Enhanced crawl depth for trending content

  • Monitored keyword movements weekly
  • Tracked Discover impressions & clicks via GSC
  • Refined content strategy based on trending queries
  • Continuous metadata testing for CTR improvement

Within months of implementing the SEO strategy, Mayapuri achieved:

  • Significant growth in organic traffic
  • Improved rankings for non-branded Bollywood keywords
  • Increased visibility in Google Discover
  • Better crawl efficiency and index coverage
  • Higher engagement metrics (time on page & pages/session)

(Exact numbers can be added if required for client reporting.)

• Established topical authority in Bollywood news segments
  • Improved Discover performance for celebrity-driven content
  • Reduced dependency on branded searches
  • Strengthened long-term organic visibility

• Google Search Console
  • Google Analytics 4
  • Screaming Frog SEO Spider
  • Ahrefs / SEMrush
  • PageSpeed Insights

Through a data-driven SEO strategy focused on technical excellence, content optimization, and Discover visibility, Mayapuri successfully strengthened its organic presence in India’s competitive entertainment news ecosystem. The campaign laid a strong foundation for sustained organic growth and long-term search dominance.
SEO case study for Mayapuri.com highlighting traffic recovery, content optimization, and ranking growth after Google core updates.

item.title: Case Study: GY3 – Fashion, Sales & Branding
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:8:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:15:"Client Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:556:"

Client Name: GY3
Industry: Fashion, Apparel & Lifestyle
Service Focus: Performance Marketing (PPC)
Objectives: Sales Growth & Brand Building
Target Location: India

GY3 is a fashion-focused D2C brand aiming to scale online sales while strengthening brand visibility in a highly competitive Indian fashion market. PPC was implemented as a core growth channel to drive immediate conversions and support long-term brand recall.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:18:"Business Challenge";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:694:"

The fashion PPC landscape in India is saturated with aggressive bidding from marketplaces and D2C brands. GY3 faced the following challenges:

  • High competition and rising CPCs in fashion keywords
  • Inconsistent ROAS from paid campaigns
  • Overdependence on limited product-focused ads
  • Low brand recall beyond performance-driven audiences
  • Need to balance sales-driven campaigns with branding initiatives
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:14:"PPC Objectives";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:547:"

The PPC strategy was designed to:

  • Drive consistent online sales through paid channels
  • Improve ROAS and cost efficiency
  • Increase brand awareness and recall
  • Scale campaigns without compromising profitability
  • Support seasonal collections and promotions
";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:24:"PPC Strategy Implemented";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:5711:"

  • Rebuilt Google Ads account with clear funnel-based structure
  • Separated campaigns into:
    • Brand campaigns
    • Category & product campaigns
    • High-intent search campaigns
    • Display & awareness campaigns
  • Improved keyword grouping and match-type strategy

  • Identified high-converting fashion and apparel keywords
  • Focused on transactional and commercial-intent searches
  • Added negative keywords to reduce wasted spend
  • Optimized bidding strategy based on performance data

  • Created multiple ad variations for A/B testing
  • Highlighted USPs, pricing, offers, and collections
  • Used strong CTA-driven ad copies for sales campaigns
  • Designed branding creatives for awareness and remarketing

  • Optimized Google Merchant Center product feed
  • Improved product titles, descriptions, and images
  • Implemented Shopping Ads for high-performing products
  • Monitored SKU-level performance for budget allocation

  • Implemented remarketing for:
    • Website visitors
    • Cart abandoners
    • Past purchasers
  • Used display and search remarketing to boost conversions
  • Strengthened brand recall through repeated touchpoints

  • Shifted budgets towards high-performing campaigns
  • Paused low-ROAS keywords and creatives
  • Optimized bids based on conversion data
  • Scaled campaigns during sales and festive periods
";}i:4;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:16:"Results Achieved";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:675:"

After PPC optimization and scaling, GY3 achieved:

  • Improved ROAS across core campaigns
  • Increased paid traffic with higher purchase intent
  • Growth in online sales and revenue contribution
  • Stronger brand visibility through awareness campaigns
  • Better balance between performance and branding ads

(Exact revenue, ROAS, and conversion metrics can be added if required.)

";}i:5;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:12:"Key PPC Wins";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:424:"
  • PPC became a predictable sales channel
  • Improved efficiency despite competitive CPCs
  • Strong remarketing performance for repeat conversions
  • Paid campaigns supported long-term brand building
";}i:6;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:22:"Platforms & Tools Used";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:431:"
  • Google Ads (Search, Display, Shopping)
  • Google Merchant Center
  • Google Analytics 4
  • Google Tag Manager
  • Meta Ads (for branding & remarketing)
";}i:7;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:10:"Conclusion";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:288:"

For GY3, PPC was executed not just as a short-term sales tactic but as a sales + branding growth engine. By combining performance-driven campaigns with brand awareness strategies, GY3 achieved scalable revenue growth while strengthening its digital brand presence.

";}}

Client Name: GY3
Industry: Fashion, Apparel & Lifestyle
Service Focus: Performance Marketing (PPC)
Objectives: Sales Growth & Brand Building
Target Location: India

GY3 is a fashion-focused D2C brand aiming to scale online sales while strengthening brand visibility in a highly competitive Indian fashion market. PPC was implemented as a core growth channel to drive immediate conversions and support long-term brand recall.

The fashion PPC landscape in India is saturated with aggressive bidding from marketplaces and D2C brands. GY3 faced the following challenges:

  • High competition and rising CPCs in fashion keywords
  • Inconsistent ROAS from paid campaigns
  • Overdependence on limited product-focused ads
  • Low brand recall beyond performance-driven audiences
  • Need to balance sales-driven campaigns with branding initiatives

The PPC strategy was designed to:

  • Drive consistent online sales through paid channels
  • Improve ROAS and cost efficiency
  • Increase brand awareness and recall
  • Scale campaigns without compromising profitability
  • Support seasonal collections and promotions

• Rebuilt Google Ads account with clear funnel-based structure
  • Separated campaigns into:
    • Brand campaigns
    • Category & product campaigns
    • High-intent search campaigns
    • Display & awareness campaigns
  • Improved keyword grouping and match-type strategy

  • Identified high-converting fashion and apparel keywords
  • Focused on transactional and commercial-intent searches
  • Added negative keywords to reduce wasted spend
  • Optimized bidding strategy based on performance data

  • Created multiple ad variations for A/B testing
  • Highlighted USPs, pricing, offers, and collections
  • Used strong CTA-driven ad copies for sales campaigns
  • Designed branding creatives for awareness and remarketing

  • Optimized Google Merchant Center product feed
  • Improved product titles, descriptions, and images
  • Implemented Shopping Ads for high-performing products
  • Monitored SKU-level performance for budget allocation

  • Implemented remarketing for:
    • Website visitors
    • Cart abandoners
    • Past purchasers
  • Used display and search remarketing to boost conversions
  • Strengthened brand recall through repeated touchpoints

  • Shifted budgets towards high-performing campaigns
  • Paused low-ROAS keywords and creatives
  • Optimized bids based on conversion data
  • Scaled campaigns during sales and festive periods

After PPC optimization and scaling, GY3 achieved:

  • Improved ROAS across core campaigns
  • Increased paid traffic with higher purchase intent
  • Growth in online sales and revenue contribution
  • Stronger brand visibility through awareness campaigns
  • Better balance between performance and branding ads

(Exact revenue, ROAS, and conversion metrics can be added if required.)

• PPC became a predictable sales channel
  • Improved efficiency despite competitive CPCs
  • Strong remarketing performance for repeat conversions
  • Paid campaigns supported long-term brand building

• Google Ads (Search, Display, Shopping)
  • Google Merchant Center
  • Google Analytics 4
  • Google Tag Manager
  • Meta Ads (for branding & remarketing)

For GY3, PPC was executed not just as a short-term sales tactic but as a sales + branding growth engine. By combining performance-driven campaigns with brand awareness strategies, GY3 achieved scalable revenue growth while strengthening its digital brand presence.
Branding and digital marketing case study for GY3 Fashion showcasing increased sales, visibility, and customer engagement online.

item.title: PPC Case Study: Tulsi Realty – 9 Meraki Panvel Lead Generation
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
a:8:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:15:"Client Overview";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:590:"

Client Name: Tulsi Realty
Project: 9 Meraki, Panvel
Industry: Real Estate (Residential Project)
Service Focus: PPC Lead Generation
Target Location: Panvel, Navi Mumbai & Nearby Regions

Tulsi Realty is a real estate developer focused on delivering premium residential projects. For the 9 Meraki Panvel project, the objective was to generate high-quality property leads through paid digital campaigns while maintaining optimal cost per lead (CPL).

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:18:"Business Challenge";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:663:"

Real estate lead generation through PPC is highly competitive, especially in emerging hubs like Panvel. The project faced the following challenges:

  • High competition from local and national developers
  • Rising CPCs in real estate keywords
  • Low lead quality from generic campaigns
  • Need for location-specific, high-intent inquiries
  • Balancing lead volume with lead quality
";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:30:"PPC Lead Generation Objectives";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:579:"

The PPC strategy was designed to:

  • Generate qualified leads for the 9 Meraki Panvel project
  • Target users actively searching for residential properties in Panvel
  • Maintain a cost-effective CPL
  • Improve lead quality for sales team follow-ups
  • Increase project visibility among homebuyers
";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:24:"PPC Strategy Implemented";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:5871:"

  • Created separate campaigns for:
    • Brand & project-specific keywords
    • Location-based property searches
    • Generic residential intent keywords
  • Segmented campaigns by match types and intent levels
  • Focused on Search campaigns for high-intent users

  • Targeted keywords such as:
    • Flats in Panvel
    • New residential projects in Panvel
    • 1 BHK / 2 BHK flats in Panvel
    • Property near Panvel station
  • Used tight geo-targeting for Panvel & Navi Mumbai
  • Added negative keywords to avoid irrelevant traffic

  • Created multiple ad copy variations highlighting:
    • Project USP
    • Location advantages
    • Amenities & lifestyle benefits
    • Strong CTAs (Book Site Visit, Enquire Now)
  • Optimized ads for higher CTR and conversion intent

  • Directed traffic to dedicated lead generation landing pages
  • Optimized lead forms to reduce friction and drop-offs
  • Ensured clear project details, trust signals, and strong CTAs
  • Improved page speed and mobile usability

  • Monitored keyword-level performance on a daily basis
  • Shifted budget toward high-converting keywords
  • Paused low-quality traffic sources
  • Optimized bids to maintain target CPL

  • Regularly reviewed lead quality using sales team feedback
  • Refined keyword and ad copy targeting
  • Adjusted geo and device-level bidding
  • Continuously improved campaign efficiency over time
";}i:4;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:16:"Results Achieved";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:676:"

With continuous PPC optimization, the campaign delivered:

  • Consistent flow of qualified real estate leads
  • Improved lead relevance for the Panvel location
  • Controlled and optimized cost per lead (CPL)
  • Better alignment between marketing and sales teams
  • Increased project visibility among active homebuyers

(Exact lead volume and CPL metrics can be added as required.)

";}i:5;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:12:"Key PPC Wins";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:442:"
  • High-intent leads for residential site visits
  • Reduced wasted ad spend through refined targeting
  • Strong performance from location-based search campaigns
  • PPC established as a reliable lead generation channel
";}i:6;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:22:"Platforms & Tools Used";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:338:"
  • Google Ads (Search)
  • Google Analytics 4
  • Google Tag Manager
  • Call Tracking & Lead Form Tracking Tools
";}i:7;a:2:{s:26:"case-study-data-list-title";s:10:"Conclusion";s:28:"case-study-data-list-content";s:331:"

For Tulsi Realty – 9 Meraki Panvel, PPC was successfully implemented as a focused lead generation engine. By targeting high-intent, location-specific searches and continuously optimizing for lead quality, the campaign delivered consistent inquiries while maintaining cost efficiency.

";}}

Client Name: Tulsi Realty
Project: 9 Meraki, Panvel
Industry: Real Estate (Residential Project)
Service Focus: PPC Lead Generation
Target Location: Panvel, Navi Mumbai & Nearby Regions

Tulsi Realty is a real estate developer focused on delivering premium residential projects. For the 9 Meraki Panvel project, the objective was to generate high-quality property leads through paid digital campaigns while maintaining optimal cost per lead (CPL).

Real estate lead generation through PPC is highly competitive, especially in emerging hubs like Panvel. The project faced the following challenges:

  • High competition from local and national developers
  • Rising CPCs in real estate keywords
  • Low lead quality from generic campaigns
  • Need for location-specific, high-intent inquiries
  • Balancing lead volume with lead quality

The PPC strategy was designed to:

  • Generate qualified leads for the 9 Meraki Panvel project
  • Target users actively searching for residential properties in Panvel
  • Maintain a cost-effective CPL
  • Improve lead quality for sales team follow-ups
  • Increase project visibility among homebuyers

• Created separate campaigns for:
    • Brand & project-specific keywords
    • Location-based property searches
    • Generic residential intent keywords
  • Segmented campaigns by match types and intent levels
  • Focused on Search campaigns for high-intent users

  • Targeted keywords such as:
    • Flats in Panvel
    • New residential projects in Panvel
    • 1 BHK / 2 BHK flats in Panvel
    • Property near Panvel station
  • Used tight geo-targeting for Panvel & Navi Mumbai
  • Added negative keywords to avoid irrelevant traffic

  • Created multiple ad copy variations highlighting:
    • Project USP
    • Location advantages
    • Amenities & lifestyle benefits
    • Strong CTAs (Book Site Visit, Enquire Now)
  • Optimized ads for higher CTR and conversion intent

  • Directed traffic to dedicated lead generation landing pages
  • Optimized lead forms to reduce friction and drop-offs
  • Ensured clear project details, trust signals, and strong CTAs
  • Improved page speed and mobile usability

  • Monitored keyword-level performance on a daily basis
  • Shifted budget toward high-converting keywords
  • Paused low-quality traffic sources
  • Optimized bids to maintain target CPL

  • Regularly reviewed lead quality using sales team feedback
  • Refined keyword and ad copy targeting
  • Adjusted geo and device-level bidding
  • Continuously improved campaign efficiency over time

With continuous PPC optimization, the campaign delivered:

  • Consistent flow of qualified real estate leads
  • Improved lead relevance for the Panvel location
  • Controlled and optimized cost per lead (CPL)
  • Better alignment between marketing and sales teams
  • Increased project visibility among active homebuyers

(Exact lead volume and CPL metrics can be added as required.)

• High-intent leads for residential site visits
  • Reduced wasted ad spend through refined targeting
  • Strong performance from location-based search campaigns
  • PPC established as a reliable lead generation channel

• Google Ads (Search)
  • Google Analytics 4
  • Google Tag Manager
  • Call Tracking & Lead Form Tracking Tools

For Tulsi Realty – 9 Meraki Panvel, PPC was successfully implemented as a focused lead generation engine. By targeting high-intent, location-specific searches and continuously optimizing for lead quality, the campaign delivered consistent inquiries while maintaining cost efficiency.
PPC case study for Tulsi Realty’s 9 Meraki project showing high-quality lead generation and improved ROI through paid campaigns.
PPC Case Study: Tulsi Realty – 9 Meraki Panvel
